name: sanction
description: The permission stack for autonomous AI agents. Sanction enforces spend policy before transactions, tracks LLM token budgets, issues scoped execution credentials, and maintains a full audit trail. Integrates via MCP (stdio), REST API, or AWS Bedrock Action Groups.

SANCTION_API_KEY.description: Agent API key (prefix: pxy_). Obtain from your Sanction wallet dashboard.

SANCTION_API_URL.description: Sanction API base URL. Defaults to https://getsanction.com/api/v1.

SANCTION_WALLET_ID.description: Wallet ID for status queries. Required only for sanction_wallet_status.

tools.name: sanction_authorize
tools.description: Check spend authorization before any purchase, subscription, or transfer. Returns approved/denied/escalated with machine-readable codes for agent replanning.

tools.name: sanction_log_tokens
tools.description: Record LLM token consumption and cost against the wallet's daily budget. Returns budget status after each call.

tools.name: sanction_request_execution
tools.description: Issue a short-lived scoped JWT for credential access within a hard spend cap. Required for secure secret injection into subprocesses or delegated agents.

tools.name: sanction_inject_credential
tools.description: Retrieve a decrypted credential using a scoped execution JWT. AES-256-GCM encrypted at rest. Every injection is audit-logged.

tools.name: sanction_wallet_status
tools.description: Check today and MTD spend, token cost, and pending human approval count for the configured wallet.
